implementer.reason: Re-entry after the CONV-052 e2e-witness tests-loopback: production already complete; the only src touch this cycle was the RemoteAgentPicker per-id select testid (inert to build+unit test). Gate re-derives from ground truth.

loopbacks.reason: Two frozen vectors carry TEST-AUTHORING defects that fail against a correct implementation (the 0021 TEST-2105 class): (1) TEST-2227 overrides the harness connect fn but asserts the UNUSED built-in h.connect spy - the override bypasses the counter, so the coalescing assertion can never see the one real attempt; tests-phase fix: mkHarness wraps any over.connect INSIDE the counted vi.fn (spread over before connect). (2) TEST-2251's stub inventory responder serves the AFTER-reconnect inventory to the FIRST connection too, so a correct inventory-driven client legitimately attaches at connection 1 (session-survival semantics) and the exactly-once snapshot/resize counts read 2; tests-phase fix: start the rig's inventory empty and populate it only after the first wire dies (in-place array mutation), keeping every assertion's intent byte-unchanged. Test-file-only changes; freeze re-captured at the tests gate per the 0018/0019/0020/0021 loopback precedent.

The first tests-loopback amendment to remote-manager-harness.ts referenced RemoteConnectFn in the wrapped-spy fix without adding it to the type-only import list - vitest is unaffected (green) but npm run typecheck is red (TS2304), exactly the 0019-stub class the F17xF18 weld routed through a sanctioned tests-phase touch. One-line import amendment; freeze re-captured (green-on-loopback per the gatekeeper's coverage-augmentation rule).

Review filed 6 findings (FINDING-001 MEDIUM sender-ungated remote:* registrar; FINDING-002 MEDIUM CONV-011 ghost entries on both sides of the bridge + closeWorkspace teardown order; FINDING-003/004/005 LOW orphan-workspace-on-refused-move / dead seed flag / hollow gate param; FINDING-006 LOW multi-window duplicate toasts, deferred to followups). None blocking; fixing eagerly in thorough mode per the 0020/0021 precedent. TDD: route through the tests phase first - add TEST-2281 (gated-sender rejection), TEST-2282 (pane-less disconnect forgets the entry), TEST-2283 (closeWorkspace order + prune wiring, guard-first movePaneToNewWorkspace) RED, freeze re-capture, then implement the fixes and re-derive the implement gate.

CONV-052 witness obligation: the e2e suite (outside the npm test gate) was run green against the built implementation and unmasked TWO authoring defects fixed under the sanctioned tests-witness banner (the 0010 FINDING-016 / 0011 TEST-678 precedent): (1) the agent-row selection relied on a hasText regex that also matched the row's 'user@host' metadata line (CONV-056) - now a stable per-id data-testid on the name button (RemoteAgentPicker gained remote-agent-select-<id>); (2) empty-workspace/add-first-terminal/mosaic assertions were unscoped and strict-mode-collided with the kept-mounted boot workspace's own prompt - now scoped to [data-active=true]. No assertion weakened. Re-capture the freeze with the corrected witnessed e2e.
